==Chinese==
{{zh-forms|s=贩}}

===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|貝|反|c1=s|c2=p|ls=psc|t1=cowry}}.

===Etymology===
The exoactive (this term requires citation) of {{och-l|反|to return, ''lit.'' "to make someone return"}} ({{zh-ref|Schuessler, 2007}}).

STEDT compares it to {{inh|zh|sit-pro|*par||to trade; to buy; to sell}}, from which {{cog|bo|ཕར||interest (on money); exchange}} is derived.
